entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The target crop of the study subjected to drought and low phosphorus stress

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Water stress (WS) that acts as a major constraint to groundnut productivity

entities.name: LOW PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: Low soil phosphorus (LP) deficiency that acts as a major constraint to groundnut productivity

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: A canopy measurement correlated to pod weight and relevant for LP tolerance

entities.name: ROOTS VOLUME
entities.description: A root-related trait measured under stress conditions

entities.name: ROOT LENGTH DENSITY
entities.description: A root-related trait that contributes to water uptake to avoid dehydration

entities.name: ROOTS DRY MATTER
entities.description: A root-related trait measured under stress conditions

entities.name: WATER EXTRACTION
entities.description: The process of water uptake from the soil, decreased by WS and LP

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency of water use, which increases under WS and decreases under LP

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE CONTENT
entities.description: A measure of water in the soil showing genotypic variation in extraction patterns

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The overall productivity of the groundnut crop

entities.name: POD WEIGHT
entities.description: A yield component decreased by low phosphorus stress

entities.name: LYSIMETRE
entities.description: A controlled condition method used to assess groundnut varieties

entities.name: ICGV 12991
entities.description: A groundnut variety showing high LAI, Pwt, WEx, RLD, RDM and tolerance to WS-LP

entities.name: 12CS-116
entities.description: A groundnut variety showing high LAI, Pwt, WEx, RLD, RDM and tolerance to WS-LP
A groundnut variety showing high transpiration efficiency and tolerance to WS-LP

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: The objective of identifying traits for groundnut improvement under stress
